items.h: Backstage Details On Bayley's WWE Contract Status, Expected Interest From AEW

items.h: Swerve Strickland, Kyle Fletcher, Tony Khan, More Set For AEW Panel At San Diego Comic Con
items.p: AEW is coming to San Diego. The company recently announced that Renee Paquette will host a panel for AEW at San Diego Comic Con on Friday, July 25. The session will tackle the future of wrestling...
